suggestions.message: Component has many children. Consider virtualizing this list (use FlashList/FlatList).
High state count. Split component into smaller pieces with localized state.
Uses context. Ensure context value is memoized to prevent unnecessary re-renders.

executiveSummary:
⚠️ Your app has significant performance issues that need immediate attention. We detected 81 frame drops, but they appear to be caused by native-layer operations like image loading or network requests. 

**Immediate Actions:**
2. 🔴 Optimize top 3 bottleneck components
